home.title: Gnars — Community-Owned Skateboarding DAO
home.description: Gnars is a community-owned skateboarding DAO funding skate culture worldwide through auctions, proposals, and grants.

about.title: About Gnars — Community-Owned Skateboarding Collective
about.description: Gnars is a community-owned skateboarding collective and DAO that funds skate culture, skaters, and independent projects worldwide.

proposals.title: Gnars Proposals — Skateboarding Grants & Funding
proposals.description: Explore Gnars proposals to see how the community funds skateboarding grants, media, and culture-driven projects.

proposalDetail.title: Proposal | Gnars DAO
proposalDetail.description: View this Gnars DAO governance proposal.

auctions.title: Gnars Auctions — Community Funded Skate Art
auctions.description: Gnars auctions support skateboarding culture by funding community projects, artists, and skate media.

treasury.title: Treasury — Gnars DAO
treasury.description: Explore the Gnars DAO treasury: ETH holdings, ERC-20 tokens, NFT assets, and on-chain analytics. Full transparency into community-owned funds on Base.

tv.title: Gnar TV — Creator Coins Feed
tv.description: Discover Gnars-paired creator coins and community content on Gnar TV.

members.title: Members — Gnars DAO
members.description: Browse all Gnars DAO members and their voting delegates. See who holds Gnars NFTs and how governance power is distributed across the community.

memberDetail.title: Member | Gnars DAO
memberDetail.description: View this member's profile on Gnars DAO.

propose.title: Create Proposal — Gnars DAO
propose.description: Submit a new proposal to Gnars DAO for community voting and funding.

feed.title: Live Feed — Gnars DAO
feed.description: Real-time activity feed showing governance votes, auction bids, and token events from Gnars DAO.

propdates.title: Propdates — Gnars DAO
propdates.description: Progress updates and reports on funded Gnars DAO proposals.

droposals.title: Gnars Drops — Community Art & Skate Media
droposals.description: Community-approved drops and skate media created by Gnars DAO members.

swap.title: Swap — Gnars DAO
swap.description: Swap tokens across Base, Ethereum, Optimism, and Arbitrum with best execution across 150+ DEXes via the 0x Protocol.

coinProposal.title: Coin Proposal — Gnars DAO
coinProposal.description: Propose a new creator coin for the Gnars DAO community.

createCoin.title: Create Coin — Gnars DAO
createCoin.description: Launch your own creator coin on Base backed by the Gnars ecosystem.

mural.title: Mural — Gnars DAO
mural.description: Interactive community mural featuring Gnars NFT artwork in a draggable grid.

map.title: Gnars World Map
map.description: Discover Gnars-funded skate spots around the world. Real skate infrastructure, funded onchain.

installations.title: Installations | Gnars
installations.description: Explore Gnars DAO's global network of skateable art installations — from Rio to Rome, onchain DIY culture made physical.

blogs.title: Blog — Gnars DAO
blogs.description: Read the latest stories, updates, and community posts from Gnars DAO. Skateboarding culture, DAO governance, and creative projects by the Gnars community.

blogPost.title: Post | Gnars Blog
blogPost.description: Read this post on the Gnars DAO community blog.

community.title: Community — Gnars DAO
community.description: Explore Gnars DAO community initiatives, grants, and challenges.

bounties.title: Gnars Grants
bounties.description: Built by shredders, tested in the real world. Gnarly challenges from the action sports community.

nogglesrails.title: NogglesRails — Community Skate Infrastructure Worldwide
nogglesrails.description: Community-funded skate rails installed in spots around the world. Open, CC0, owned by no one and everyone.
